# Padme

> Padme is the custom keypad for Mac. It is an iOS app that turns an iPhone into a fully custom wireless keypad for a Mac — numeric keypad, navigation pad, and macro pad in one.

Padme lets you build unlimited custom keypad layouts with numbers, navigation keys, punctuation, letters, and key combinations, and connect them to your Mac wirelessly over local Wi-Fi. No cables or adapters are required. The Padme Companion app for Mac is bundled inside the iOS app and is AirDropped to the Mac from within Padme on the iPhone — there is no separate companion app to download.

## Key facts
- Product name: Padme — Custom Keypad for Mac
- Platforms: iOS app (controller) + macOS companion app
- Connection: Wireless over local Wi-Fi (no cables, no adapters)
- Companion Mac app: Bundled in the iOS app, AirDropped from the iPhone (no separate download)
- Pricing: Free download, with an option to unlock unlimited keyboards
- Author / Publisher: Giuseppe Bertolini
- Website: https://mac-numeric-pad.lightme.site/
- Support email: support@lightme.site

## Features
- Fully custom keypad layouts — drag, resize, and edit individual keys
- Mix numbers, navigation, punctuation, letters, and key combinations
- Unlimited keyboards — create and import as many layouts as you want
- Wireless, instant connection to Mac over local Wi-Fi
- Switch instantly between layouts (numeric pad, navigation pad, macro pad, and more)
- Companion Mac app bundled and AirDroppable from iOS

## Common use cases
- Wireless numeric keypad / numpad for MacBooks without a number pad
- Navigation pad with arrow keys for editing and navigation
- Macro pad / shortcut pad for app-specific shortcuts and key combinations

## Links
- Website: https://mac-numeric-pad.lightme.site/
- Download on the App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/padme-custom-keypad-for-mac/id6784965259
- Screenshot (numeric keypad): https://mac-numeric-pad.lightme.site/imgs/padme-numeric-keypad.webp
